Badge

Status indicator and notification badge using <lyte-badge> Slyte DOM for count/dot overlays on icons, and custom HTML for standalone status dots.

Indicators Figma Synced 4 Statuses × 2 Sizes
Status Types — Default Size (8px)
Active
Warning
Error
Inactive
HTML
<!-- Standalone status dots — custom HTML (lyte-badge is an overlay badge) -->
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-active"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-warning"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-error"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-inactive"></span>
SCSS
.zc-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-default, #9EA0A7);
}
.zc-badge-active {
  background-color: var(--zc-color-success-surface-success-surface-default, #078841);
}
.zc-badge-warning {
  background-color: var(--zc-color-warning-surface-warning-surface-default, #D25704);
}
.zc-badge-error {
  background-color: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-default, #CC1914);
}
.zc-badge-inactive {
  background-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-default, #9EA0A7);
}
Default Size (8×8px)
Active
Warning
Error
Inactive
HTML
<!-- Default size (8px) -->
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-active"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-warning"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-error"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-inactive"></span>
SCSS
.zc-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}
Small Size (4×4px)
Active
Warning
Error
Inactive
HTML
<!-- Small size (4px) -->
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-active zc-badge-sm"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-warning zc-badge-sm"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-error zc-badge-sm"></span>
<span class="zc-badge zc-badge-inactive zc-badge-sm"></span>
SCSS
.zc-badge-sm {
  width: 4px;
  height: 4px;
}
Badge with Text Label
ActiveActive
WarningWarning
ErrorError
InactiveInactive
HTML
<!-- Custom HTML — badge + text label layout -->
<span class="zc-badge-inline">
  <span class="zc-badge zc-badge-active"></span>
  Active
</span>
SCSS
.zc-badge-inline {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #37383C;
}
Badge Count — <lyte-badge>
Count 3
Count 12
Count 99+
HTML
<!-- Count badge using lyte-badge -->
<lyte-badge lt-prop-data="3"></lyte-badge>

<lyte-badge lt-prop-data="12"></lyte-badge>

<!-- Max 2 digits → shows 99+ -->
<lyte-badge lt-prop-data="100" lt-prop-max-length="2"></lyte-badge>
Badge on Icon — Dot (<lyte-badge>)
Notification
Mail
Chat
Settings
HTML
<!-- Dot badge on icon using lyte-badge -->
<lyte-badge lt-prop-position="topRight"
            lt-prop-badge-style='{"background-color":"#CC1914"}'>
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="lyteBadgeYield">
    <i class="fas fa-bell"></i>
  </template>
</lyte-badge>

<lyte-badge lt-prop-position="topRight"
            lt-prop-badge-style='{"background-color":"#078841"}'>
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="lyteBadgeYield">
    <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
  </template>
</lyte-badge>
Badge on Icon — Count (<lyte-badge>)
Notification
Mail
Chat
HTML
<!-- Count badge on icon using lyte-badge -->
<lyte-badge lt-prop-data="5" lt-prop-position="topRight">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="lyteBadgeYield">
    <i class="fas fa-bell"></i>
  </template>
</lyte-badge>

<!-- With max-length (shows 99+) -->
<lyte-badge lt-prop-data="150" lt-prop-position="topRight" lt-prop-max-length="2">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="lyteBadgeYield">
    <i class="fas fa-comment"></i>
  </template>
</lyte-badge>
